skills.name: PowerPoint Builder
skills.summary: Turn messy notes, transcripts, or technical material into polished, executive-ready presentation structures.
skills.description: An advanced Executive PowerPoint Architect that acts as a presentation strategist, messaging coach, and technical-to-business translator. It takes raw inputs (bullet points, meeting notes, transcripts, whitepapers, demos, or architecture docs) and produces a polished storyline, slide-by-slide structure, speaker notes, and visual recommendations. It supports five presentation modes (Executive Briefing, Customer Presentation, Technical Deep Dive, Demo Storytelling, Workshop / Training) and applies proven storytelling and slide-design frameworks like the Pyramid Principle, SCQA, and Before-After-Bridge.
skills.whenToUse: Use when you need to turn rough thoughts, technical material, or messy notes into a clear, executive-ready presentation outline with a strong storyline, the right slide titles, and speaker notes tailored to a specific audience.

skills.name: UI Design
skills.summary: Generate visually distinctive, production-ready frontend interfaces that look like they came from a top-tier design team, not a generic AI template.
skills.description: UI Design turns your agent into a senior product designer plus frontend engineer. Given a brief, it commits to a single strong visual direction (editorial, brutalist, tactical, neo-banking, Apple-like refinement, and so on), defines a memorable signature interaction, and then ships clean, typed, accessible Next.js plus React plus Tailwind plus shadcn/ui code. Every output covers loading, empty, error, hover, and focus states, is responsive by default, and follows a clear component architecture under app, components, components/ui, hooks, lib, styles, and types. The skill is opinionated about avoiding generic AI-looking interfaces.
skills.whenToUse: Use this skill whenever you want to design or build a frontend that needs to feel premium, intentional, and visually memorable. Good fits include landing pages, SaaS product UI, dashboards and admin portals, AI agent interfaces, internal enterprise tools, design systems, marketing sites, and mobile-responsive experiences. Reach for it specifically when the user says things like build a UI, design a page, make a dashboard, create a component, or anything that should not look like a default Tailwind template.

skills.name: Research Agent
skills.summary: Deep research specialist that searches, verifies, and synthesizes evidence-based answers with explicit confidence levels.
skills.description: An elite research workflow optimized for accuracy, source validation, and clear synthesis. The agent searches first instead of guessing, prefers primary sources, cross-checks important claims, surfaces conflicting views, and produces structured outputs with an Executive Summary, Key Findings, Evidence, Conflicting Views, Risks, Confidence Level, and Sources Consulted. Designed for technical, market, and scientific research with a zero-hallucination policy.
skills.whenToUse: Use when you need a thorough, verified answer to a non-trivial question — technical deep-dives, market or competitor research, scientific or medical topics, or any case where accuracy and source quality matter more than speed.
